name: Snowflake
one_liner: Snowflake is a cloud data platform (AI Data Cloud) for data warehousing, analytics, and AI, exposing SQL and resource-management REST APIs plus a managed MCP server.
primary_auth: Key pair (RSA key-pair JWT) for programmatic REST/SQL API access; OAuth2 and PATs also supported.
access_notes: A 30-day free trial with $400 in credits is available at signup.snowflake.com with no credit card required (email + company only). The trial provisions a real account that yields working API credentials (create a user, assign an RSA public key, generate JWT) with no human approval. It is a trial of a paid SaaS; after 30 days or credit exhaustion a credit card is needed to continue.
api_notes: Two main REST surfaces: the SQL API (POST /api/v2/statements to run SQL) and the Snowflake REST API covering resource management for databases, schemas, tables (incl. dynamic/Iceberg), views, stages, pipes, users, roles, grants, network/password policies, warehouses, accounts, tasks, streams, alerts, functions, procedures, notebooks, Streamlit apps, Cortex (Analyst/Search/Inference/Embed), and Snowpark Container Services. OpenAPI-spec compliant. Also official drivers/connectors (Python, Node.js, JDBC, ODBC, Go, .NET), Snowpark, SnowSQL, and Snowflake CLI. Effectively 100+ operations.
mcp_notes: Snowflake ships a vendor MCP offering: a Snowflake-managed (hosted) MCP server documented at docs.snowflake.com (cortex-agents-mcp) exposing Cortex Analyst, Cortex Search, Cortex Agents, and SQL execution as tools, plus an open-source implementation at github.com/Snowflake-Labs/mcp. Both are first-party.
main_blocker: None hard: public REST/SQL APIs with self-serve trial creds (no card). Minor friction is key-pair/JWT setup and that sustained use beyond the 30-day/$400 trial requires a paid account.

evidence.claim: Snowflake REST API covers databases, warehouses, users, tasks, streams, Cortex, and more resource families, OpenAPI-spec compliant.
SQL API and REST APIs authenticate via key-pair JWT (Authorization: Bearer, X-Snowflake-Authorization-Token-Type: KEYPAIR_JWT) and OAuth.
Snowflake offers a Snowflake-managed MCP server exposing Cortex Analyst, Cortex Search, Cortex Agents, and SQL execution as tools.
Open-source first-party MCP server for Snowflake (Cortex AI, object management, SQL orchestration).
30-day free trial with $400 credits, no credit card required to sign up.

open_questions: Whether the trial classification should be SELF_SERVE_FREE (no card, working creds) vs SELF_SERVE_TRIAL (paid SaaS trial) is a judgment call. Also whether Snowflake's alert/notification integrations count as outbound webhooks for agent purposes.
